name: sky-viewer
description: Single-page, offline-capable star visualizer. Pick date + location + direction, see the sky. No backend, no API keys.

scripts.build: node esbuild.config.mjs && node tools/inline-html.mjs && npm run check:payload
scripts.build:data: tsx tools/build-stars.ts && tsx tools/build-constellations.ts && tsx tools/build-world.ts && tsx tools/build-cities.ts && tsx tools/build-tz.ts
scripts.deploy: npm run build && git subtree push --prefix dist origin gh-pages
